name: bioethics_procurement_shortcut_northpine_auto_ben
premise: A Bioethics ethics consult line is in a fast-moving incident involving bioethics procurement shortcut northpine auto ben. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next shift change. Every delay increases consent, harm minimization, and precedent. Stakeholders are already framing this as autonomy vs beneficence under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Noah Reed
agents.identity: I am Noah Reed, accountable for a defensible call in Bioethics when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays beneficence for autonomy.

agents.name: Jonah Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Jonah Kowalski, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Bioethics.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so beneficence isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of autonomy.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect beneficence.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to beneficence to secure autonomy under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next shift change. Evidence is partial. Noah Reed must decide under autonomy vs beneficence. What does Noah Reed do?
